content_fingerprint: fal ai adds runner termination reason to serverless dashboard fal ai has updated its serverless platform dashboard with a new feature that displays why a runner was terminated directly alongside the runner s state the feature listed in fal ai s april 23 2026 changelog under the broader update titled serverless scaling observability cold starts multi gpu more surfaces termination reasons inline on the runner detail page previously developers using fal ai s serverless runner infrastructure had limited built in visibility into why a runner stopped executing particularly in multi gpu or cold start
